headlines.description: Injury-hit Bayern Munich battled to a 3-2 victory at Augsburg in the Bavarian derby on Saturday to cut the gap to Bayer Leverkusen to one point.
headlines.shortLinkText: Davies, Kane on target as Bayern beat Augsburg

video.headline: Bayern hold on to win 5-goal thriller vs. Augsburg

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Bayern hold on to win 5-goal thriller vs. Augsburg) 2023/01/27 US ONLY

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart's Deniz Undav scored a hat-trick as his side demolished visitors RB Leipzig 5-2 on Saturday and tightened their grip on third spot in the Bundesliga.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stuttgart crush hapless Leipzig 5-2, stay third

video.headline: Undav hat trick powers Stuttgart past top-4 rivals Leipzig

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (VfB Stuttgart vs. RB Leipzig - Game Highlights) 2024/01/27 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayer Leverkusen squandered a bagful of chances before settling for a 0-0 draw against visitors Borussia Monchengladbach on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Misfiring Leverkusen held at home by Gladbach

video.headline: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Borussia Monchengladbach - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayer Leverkusen vs. Borussia Monchengladbach - Game Highlights) 2024/01/27 ESHEET
